## Summary

## Evidence and provenance checklist

- [ ] New edges include tier, species evidence, and primary citations.
- [ ] New protein nodes include UniProt accessions.
- [ ] New phosphorylation edges include phospho-sites and PhosphoSitePlus IDs.
- [ ] Source snapshots include SHA-256 provenance records.
- [ ] Nomenclature guards and identifier checks pass.
